data.title: Beyond Meat to Appeal $38.9M Trademark Verdict
data.description:
TipRanks Black Friday Sale

  • Claim 60% off TipRanks Premium for the data-backed insights and research tools you need to invest with confidence.
  • Subscribe to TipRanks' Smart Investor Picks and see our data in action through our high-performing model portfolio - now also 60% off

An update from Beyond Meat ( (BYND) ) is now available.

Beyond Meat has been involved in two significant legal disputes. The first involves a trademark infringement case filed by Sonate Corporation, claiming Beyond Meat’s use of certain taglines infringed on Sonate’s trademark. The case, which began in 2022, concluded with a jury verdict in November 2025, finding Beyond Meat liable and awarding damages totaling $38.9 million. Beyond Meat plans to appeal the decision. The second dispute involves Aliments BVeggie, Inc., which filed a lawsuit in 2023 alleging breach of a co-manufacturing agreement and seeking damages of CAD 129,841,920. The case has been referred to arbitration in California following a series of legal proceedings in Canada, with BVeggie appealing the decision.

The most recent analyst rating on (BYND) stock is a Sell with a $1.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Beyond Meat stock, see the BYND Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on BYND Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, BYND is a Underperform.

Beyond Meat’s overall stock score is primarily driven by its poor financial performance and weak technical indicators. The company’s negative profitability, high leverage, and cash flow issues are significant concerns. While there are efforts to restructure and reduce debt, the current financial instability and bearish market sentiment weigh heavily on the stock’s outlook.

To see Spark’s full report on BYND stock, click here.

More about Beyond Meat

Beyond Meat is a company operating in the food industry, primarily focusing on the production and sale of plant-based meat substitutes. The company aims to provide alternatives to traditional meat products, targeting consumers seeking sustainable and health-conscious dietary options.

Average Trading Volume: 176,073,931

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: $388.8M

The latest announcement is out from Kingsgate Consolidated Limited ( (AU:KCN) ).

Kingsgate Consolidated Limited has reached a mutual agreement with the Thai Government to terminate the arbitration proceedings under the Thailand–Australia Free Trade Agreement, which began in 2017. This development marks a positive shift in relations, expected to benefit both Kingsgate and Thailand through continued operations at the Chatree Mine, enhancing long-term value for shareholders and stakeholders.

Kesselrun Resources ( (TSE:KES) ) has issued an update.

Kesselrun Resources Ltd. has received shareholder and court approval for its plan of arrangement with Gold X2 Mining Inc., which will see Gold X2 acquire all outstanding Kesselrun shares. The arrangement, overwhelmingly supported by Kesselrun shareholders, involves exchanging Kesselrun shares for Gold X2 shares and cash. This strategic move is expected to enhance Gold X2’s position in the gold mining industry, with Kesselrun’s assets complementing Gold X2’s existing projects, particularly the Moss Gold Project in Ontario.

Spark’s Take on TSE:KES Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, TSE:KES is a Neutral.

Kesselrun Resources faces significant financial challenges with no revenue and consistent losses, which dominate its stock evaluation. While technical indicators point to a bearish trend, recent corporate events offer some hope for future exploration success. However, the current negative P/E ratio and lack of dividend yield weaken the valuation appeal. Overall, the stock’s score reflects these financial and operational difficulties, with some potential upside from exploration activities.

To see Spark’s full report on TSE:KES stock, click here.

More about Kesselrun Resources

Kesselrun Resources Ltd. is a mineral exploration company based in Thunder Bay, Ontario, focused on growth through property acquisitions and discoveries. The company holds a 100% interest in the Huronian Gold Project and the Bluffpoint Gold Project, both located in Ontario, Canada.

data.description:

  • Claim 60% off TipRanks Premium for the data-backed insights and research tools you need to invest with confidence.
  • Subscribe to TipRanks' Smart Investor Picks and see our data in action through our high-performing model portfolio - now also 60% off

Zhongchao ( (ZCMD) ) just unveiled an update.

Zhongchao Inc. has announced an extraordinary general meeting of its Class A ordinary shareholders to be held on January 20, 2026, in New York. The meeting will address two key proposals: a special resolution to increase the voting rights of Class B ordinary shares from 100 to 1,000 votes per share, and an ordinary resolution to adjourn the meeting if necessary. The board of directors recommends voting in favor of both proposals, which could significantly impact the company’s governance structure by altering the balance of voting power among shareholders.

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, ZCMD is a Neutral.

data.description:

  • Claim 60% off TipRanks Premium for the data-backed insights and research tools you need to invest with confidence.
  • Subscribe to TipRanks' Smart Investor Picks and see our data in action through our high-performing model portfolio - now also 60% off

SolarWindow Technologies ( (WNDW) ) has issued an announcement.

On November 20, 2025, SolarWindow Technologies appointed Francisco Javier Bono Perez to its Board of Directors. Mr. Bono, who has extensive experience in the glass industry, is expected to bring valuable insights to the company. His appointment follows a $1 million investment from Silica Holding B.V., a company he founded, which focuses on transformative technologies in the glass, renewable energy, and defense sectors. This strategic move is anticipated to enhance SolarWindow’s market position and expand its product reach.

More about SolarWindow Technologies

SolarWindow Technologies, Inc. is a developer of transparent electricity-generating coatings for glass and plastics. The company’s LiquidElectricity® coatings generate electricity under various light conditions and are targeted for use in architectural applications such as building windows, facades, and rooftops, as well as automotive, commercial greenhouse, marine, and aerospace applications.
